Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jenny Y. Lin, esq. (415-352-6451) for Petitioner.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER COBALT LLP's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To CCP Sec. 1285:

Petitioners Cobalt LLP and Tsan Abrahamson's motion to confirm arbitration award is granted.
No opposition filed.

Order is signed in open court.
